# Engine capability matrix

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen_capability_matrix.py - DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- Run `python scripts/gen_capability_matrix.py` to regenerate. -->

This is the authoritative list of what the engine can do, read straight from
the registries in `src/decoy_engine/`. Narrative guides (strategies, connector
support, disguises) must agree with this file; the drift-guard test enforces it.

## Mask strategies (12)

| Strategy | GDPR technique class | Polars-accelerated |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bucketize` | anonymisation | yes |
| `categorical` | synthetic | yes |
| `date_shift` | pseudonymisation | yes |
| `faker` | synthetic | yes |
| `formula` | pseudonymisation | yes |
| `fpe` | pseudonymisation | yes |
| `hash` | pseudonymisation | yes |
| `passthrough` | passthrough | yes |
| `redact` | anonymisation | yes |
| `shuffle` | anonymisation | yes |
| `text_redact` | anonymisation | yes |
| `truncate` | anonymisation | yes |

`nested` is an internal wrapper, not a user-facing strategy.

## Generation strategies (7)

`categorical`, `distribution`, `faker`, `formula`, `reference`, `sequence`, `statistical`
